title: ScadaTag
description: Schema for a SCADA data tag representing a sensor reading, setpoint, or control variable

tagId.description: Unique identifier for the tag in the SCADA system

tagPath.description: Hierarchical path to the tag in the SCADA tag browser

value.description: Current value of the tag (type depends on dataType)

dataType.description: Data type of the tag value

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the tag reading

quality.description: OPC-UA quality code indicating data reliability

engineeringUnits.description: Physical engineering units for the tag value

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tag measures
description.example: Pressure at reactor inlet measured by differential pressure transmitter PV-101

alarmLimits.description: Configured alarm threshold limits for the tag

deviceId.description: Identifier of the PLC or RTU providing the tag

protocol.description: Communication protocol used to read this tag

processArea.description: Logical process area or plant unit this tag belongs to
